name: update_workflow_approval
description: Approve or reject a workflow that is currently pending your approval. This moves the contract to the next step in its lifecycle (e.g., from internal review to counterparty signature) or returns it for revision.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the workflow to approve or reject.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The approval action to take: 'approve' or 'reject'.

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Optional comment explaining the approval or rejection reason.
parameters.example: Looks good, approved for counterparty review.

body.comment: Looks good, approved for counterparty review.
